name: Summer Circus Spectacular
venue: Historic Asolo Theater at The Ringling
hours_label: Tue–Fri 11 AM & 2 PM, Sat 2 & 5 PM · $20 adult / $15 child
blurb: The Circus Arts Conservatory and The Ringling team up for Sarasota's beloved summer tradition, with world-class circus artists performing in the jewel-box Historic Asolo Theater. Tickets are $20 for adults and $15 for kids 12 and under, and adding the Circus Museum is just $5 more.

name: Marvin: A Marvin Gaye Revue
venue: Westcoast Black Theatre Troupe — Donelly Theatre
hours_label: 7:30 PM Tue–Sat, 2 PM Sat & Sun · Ticketed
blurb: A brand-new musical celebration of Marvin Gaye's timeless catalog, created and directed by WBTT founder Nate Jacobs before the show heads to an international festival. Sheldon Rhoden leads an electrifying ensemble of WBTT favorites. Tickets via the box office (941-366-1505) — final week, closes Jul 24.
photo_credit: Photo: Westcoast Black Theatre Troupe / VisitSarasota.com

name: Siesta Key Drum Circle
blurb: Siesta Key's famous Sunday-evening ritual since 1996: drummers, dancers and hundreds of onlookers gather on the quartz sand south of the pavilion as the sun drops into the Gulf. Free, all ages, and quintessential Siesta.

name: Sarasota Farmers Market
address: Lemon Ave & Main St, Sarasota, FL 34236
blurb: Downtown Sarasota's Saturday-morning staple: fresh produce, flowers, baked goods, coffee and local makers along Lemon Avenue and Main Street. Free to browse, dog-friendly, and a great way to see downtown at its liveliest.
